__comment__: Custom model data is setup in the following way: {floats:[bow_damage, hull_damage, mast_damage, stern_damage, sail_state, animation_step, rudder_angle], flags:[anchor_state, net_thrown], strings:[bow_skin, hull_skin, mast_skin, stern_skin]}, and to whomever is forced to read this: may the gods have mercy on your damned soul.
